description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the coderus/sailfishos-platform-sdk-base:latest Docker image and runs `source mido.env` as a before_script for all jobs. Define a single stage named build and add a run-build job in that stage that executes `./run-mic.sh`. Configure the job to keep any `sfe-*/*.zip` files as artifacts. Restrict the job to run only on the `web` branch and on tag pipelines. No additional services, caches, or deployment steps are required.
